# Wikifunctions Catalog

Complete catalog of all **3911** functions and **71** types on
[Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/) as used by Abstract Wikipedia.

*Auto-generated by `research/fetch_wikifunctions_catalog.py`*

## Currently Used in AbstractTestBot

These are the functions and types we have **successfully implemented** in our shrine article
creation workflow (`create_rich_onepass.py`). They are injected into the Abstract Wikipedia
visual editor clipboard as nested Z-object JSON.

### Functions We Use

#### Z14396: string of monolingual text ✅ IMPLEMENTED

**Bot usage:** Used to wrap monolingual text strings inside article fragments

> gets the raw string (without the associated language) from a monolingual text

**Signature:** `string of monolingual text(full monolingual text: Monolingual text (Z11))` -> `String (Z6)`

| Argument | Key | Type |
|----------|-----|------|
| full monolingual text | `Z14396K1` | Monolingual text (Z11) |

**Returns:** String (Z6)  
**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z14396)

---

#### Z26570: State location using entity and class ✅ IMPLEMENTED

**Bot usage:** Core function: generates 'located in [entity], [class]' text for shrine location fragments

> Forms a sentence stating the location and class of a given entity. E.g. "Seoul is a city in South Korea."

**Signature:** `State location using entity and class(entity: Wikidata item reference (Z6091), class: Wikidata item reference (Z6091), location: Wikidata item reference (Z6091), language: Natural language (Z60))` -> `Monolingual text (Z11)`

| Argument | Key | Type |
|----------|-----|------|
| entity | `Z26570K1` | Wikidata item reference (Z6091) |
| class | `Z26570K2` | Wikidata item reference (Z6091) |
| location | `Z26570K3` | Wikidata item reference (Z6091) |
| language | `Z26570K4` | Natural language (Z60) |

**Returns:** Monolingual text (Z11)  
**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z26570)

---

#### Z27868: string to HTML fragment ✅ IMPLEMENTED

**Bot usage:** Converts a plain string into an HTML fragment for the visual editor clipboard

> Converts a string in an HTML fragment, escaping reserved characters

**Signature:** `string to HTML fragment(string: String (Z6))` -> `HTML fragment (Z89)`

| Argument | Key | Type |
|----------|-----|------|
| string | `Z27868K1` | String (Z6) |

**Returns:** HTML fragment (Z89)  
**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z27868)

---

#### Z28016: defining role sentence ✅ IMPLEMENTED

**Bot usage:** Core function: generates 'The deity of [shrine] is [deity]' sentences for deity fragments

> Sentences of the type "Paris is the capital of France." or "Elisabeth II is the mother of Charles III."

**Signature:** `defining role sentence(subject: Wikidata item reference (Z6091), role: Wikidata item reference (Z6091), dependency: Wikidata item reference (Z6091), language: Natural language (Z60))` -> `Monolingual text (Z11)`

| Argument | Key | Type |
|----------|-----|------|
| subject | `Z28016K1` | Wikidata item reference (Z6091) |
| role | `Z28016K2` | Wikidata item reference (Z6091) |
| dependency | `Z28016K3` | Wikidata item reference (Z6091) |
| language | `Z28016K4` | Natural language (Z60) |

**Returns:** Monolingual text (Z11)  
**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z28016)

---

#### Z29749: Monolingual text as HTML fragment w/ auto-langcode ✅ IMPLEMENTED

**Bot usage:** Wraps monolingual text as an HTML fragment with automatic language code detection

> escapes the given string for inclusion in HTML (rich text), and if its language code doesn't match the given language, prepends that code (as plaintext, but may be rich text in future, see T340624)

**Signature:** `Monolingual text as HTML fragment w/ auto-langcode(text: Monolingual text (Z11), requested language: Natural language (Z60))` -> `HTML fragment (Z89)`

| Argument | Key | Type |
|----------|-----|------|
| text | `Z29749K1` | Monolingual text (Z11) |
| requested language | `Z29749K2` | Natural language (Z60) |

**Returns:** HTML fragment (Z89)  
**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z29749)

---

### Types We Use

#### Z6091: Wikidata item reference ✅ IMPLEMENTED

**Bot usage:** Type used as Wikidata item reference wrapper in both location and deity fragments

> A link to a Wikidata item, using the item's Wikidata ID (QID)

| Key | ID | Type |
|-----|-----|------|
| Wikidata item id | `Z6091K1` | String (Z6) |

**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z6091)

---

### How They Nest Together

Each article has two clipboard fragments. Here's how the functions compose:

```
Fragment 1: Location
  Z27868 (string to HTML fragment)
    └─ Z14396 (string of monolingual text)
         └─ Z26570 (State location using entity and class)
              ├─ Z26570K1: argument key reference
              ├─ Z26570K2: Z6091 (Wikidata item ref) → Q845945 (shrine QID)
              ├─ Z26570K3: Z6091 (Wikidata item ref) → Q17 (country: Japan)
              └─ Z26570K4: argument key reference

Fragment 2: Deity
  Z29749 (monolingual text as HTML fragment w/ auto-langcode)
    ├─ Z29749K1:
    │   └─ Z28016 (defining role sentence)
    │        ├─ Z28016K1: Z6091 (Wikidata item ref) → deity QID
    │        ├─ Z28016K2: Z6091 (Wikidata item ref) → Q11591100 (Shinto shrine)
    │        ├─ Z28016K3: argument key reference
    │        └─ Z28016K4: argument key reference
    └─ Z29749K2: argument key reference
```

## Types Catalog

All **71** types available on Wikifunctions.

### Z1: Object

> the root concept of an item in the Wikifunctions system, from which all other objects descend

| Key | ID | Type |
|-----|-----|------|
| type | `Z1K1` | Type (Z4) |

**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z1)

---

### Z2: Persistent object

> A Z1/Object which is stored persistently on the Wikifunctions wiki.

| Key | ID | Type |
|-----|-----|------|
| id | `Z2K1` | String (Z6) |
| value | `Z2K2` | Object (Z1) |
| labels | `Z2K3` | Multilingual text (Z12) |
| aliases | `Z2K4` | Multilingual stringset (Z32) |
| short descriptions | `Z2K5` | Multilingual text (Z12) |

**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z2)

---

### Z3: Key

> A referenced key/value pair within a Z4/Type.

| Key | ID | Type |
|-----|-----|------|
| value type | `Z3K1` | Type (Z4) |
| key id | `Z3K2` | String (Z6) |
| label | `Z3K3` | Multilingual text (Z12) |
| is identity | `Z3K4` | Boolean (Z40) |

**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z3)

---

### Z4: Type

> A class of Z1/Object, with a set list of Z3/Keys.

| Key | ID | Type |
|-----|-----|------|
| identity | `Z4K1` | Type (Z4) |
| keys | `Z4K2` | Typed list (Z881)(Key) |
| validator | `Z4K3` | Function (Z8) |
| equality | `Z4K4` | Function (Z8) |
| display function | `Z4K5` | Function (Z8) |
| reading function | `Z4K6` | Function (Z8) |
| type converters to code | `Z4K7` | Typed list (Z881)(Type converter to code) |
| type converters from code | `Z4K8` | Typed list (Z881)(Type converter from code) |

**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z4)

---

### Z5: Error

> An error where something has gone wrong in the system, such as when you use a Z40/Boolean function on a Z6/String, or try to edit something that is locked.

| Key | ID | Type |
|-----|-----|------|
| error type | `Z5K1` | Error type (Z50) |
| error value | `Z5K2` | Object (Z1) |

**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z5)

---

### Z6: String

> A sequence of characters, and one of the fundamental Z4/Types available in the Wikifunctions system.

| Key | ID | Type |
|-----|-----|------|
| value | `Z6K1` | String (Z6) |

**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z6)

---

### Z7: Function call

> A call to a Z8/Function, including its inputs.

| Key | ID | Type |
|-----|-----|------|
| function | `Z7K1` | Function (Z8) |

**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z7)

---

### Z8: Function

> A concept of a computable resource, which through its Z14/Implementations and Z20/Testers can let you make a calculation or perform some other task.

| Key | ID | Type |
|-----|-----|------|
| arguments | `Z8K1` | Typed list (Z881)(Argument declaration) |
| return type | `Z8K2` | Type (Z4) |
| testers | `Z8K3` | Typed list (Z881)(Test case) |
| implementations | `Z8K4` | Typed list (Z881)(Implementation) |
| identity | `Z8K5` | Function (Z8) |

**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z8)

---

### Z9: Reference

> A link to another Z1/Object.

| Key | ID | Type |
|-----|-----|------|
| reference id | `Z9K1` | String (Z6) |

**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z9)

---

### Z11: Monolingual text

> A Z6/String of text in a given Z60/Natural language, used to label things for humans to read.

| Key | ID | Type |
|-----|-----|------|
| language | `Z11K1` | Natural language (Z60) |
| text | `Z11K2` | String (Z6) |

**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z11)

---

### Z12: Multilingual text

> A list of Z11/MonolingualStrings, up to one for each Z60/Natural language, used to label things for humans to read in multiple languages.

| Key | ID | Type |
|-----|-----|------|
| texts | `Z12K1` | Typed list (Z881)(Monolingual text) |

**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z12)

---

### Z14: Implementation

> An implementation of a Z8/Function which can be checked as working through its Z20/Test cases and if working can be used in a Z7/Function call.

| Key | ID | Type |
|-----|-----|------|
| function | `Z14K1` | Function (Z8) |
| composition | `Z14K2` | Object (Z1) |
| code | `Z14K3` | Code (Z16) |
| built-in | `Z14K4` | Function (Z8) |

**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z14)

---

### Z16: Code

> A block of code for a Z14/Implementation.

| Key | ID | Type |
|-----|-----|------|
| language | `Z16K1` | Programming language (Z61) |
| code | `Z16K2` | String (Z6) |
| has callbacks to the orchestrator | `Z16K3` | Boolean (Z40) |

**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z16)

---

### Z17: Argument declaration

> A specification of what an input to a Z8/Function should be.

| Key | ID | Type |
|-----|-----|------|
| type | `Z17K1` | Type (Z4) |
| key | `Z17K2` | String (Z6) |
| label | `Z17K3` | Multilingual text (Z12) |

**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z17)

---

### Z18: Argument reference

> A link to an input to a Z7/Function call, or placeholder for one.

| Key | ID | Type |
|-----|-----|------|
| key id | `Z18K1` | String (Z6) |

**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z18)

---

### Z20: Test case

> A special call to a Z8/Function used to check if a Z14/Implementation returns the expected result.

| Key | ID | Type |
|-----|-----|------|
| function | `Z20K1` | Function (Z8) |
| call | `Z20K2` | Function call (Z7) |
| result validation | `Z20K3` | Function call (Z7) |

**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z20)

---

> type that can take only a single value

| metadata | `Z22K2` | Object (Z1) |

---

> No instances of this are allowed.

| language | `Z31K1` | Natural language (Z60) |
| stringset | `Z31K2` | Typed list (Z881)(String) |

**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z31)

---

> A list of Z31/Monolingual stringsets, up to one for each Z60/Natural language, used to document multiple labels for humans to read in multiple languages.

| stringset | `Z32K1` | Typed list (Z881)(Monolingual stringset) |

### Z16153: Aliquot sequence size

> Calculates the number of elements of the Aliquot sequence of a natural number, up to 1 or the last non-repeating element in a cycle. If the number of elements is unknown (e.g. Lehmer Five), it should return -1.

**Signature:** `Aliquot sequence size(number: Natural number (Z13518))` -> `Natural number (Z13518)`

| Argument | Key | Type |

### Z17727: Swedish noun root in first morpheme in combinations

> The root morpheme is used when combining words. E.g. root of "flicka" is "flick" and used in e.g. "flickskola" when combining.
Note: this function is for mophemes that come first when combining. E.g. "äpple" -> "äppel" when first as in "äppelpaj". But when non-first "äpple" -> "äpple" as in "granatäpple"

### Z30000: Sunset sentence for location on date

> Returns a sentence that expresses the time of sunset in a particular location on a particular date, from the perspective of another date to determine the tense.

**Signature:** `Sunset sentence for location on date(location on Earth (QID): Wikidata item reference (Z6091), date of sunset: Gregorian calendar date (Z20420), today's date (to decide sentence tense): Gregorian calendar date (Z20420), language: Natural language (Z60))` -> `Monolingual text (Z11)`

| Argument | Key | Type |
|----------|-----|------|
| location on Earth (QID) | `Z30000K1` | Wikidata item reference (Z6091) |
| date of sunset | `Z30000K2` | Gregorian calendar date (Z20420) |
| today's date (to decide sentence tense) | `Z30000K3` | Gregorian calendar date (Z20420) |
| language | `Z30000K4` | Natural language (Z60) |

**Returns:** Monolingual text (Z11)  
**Implementations:** 0 | **Tests:** 0
**Link:** [View on Wikifunctions](https://www.wikifunctions.org/view/en/Z30000)
